title: pyrus humilis
intro: Pyrus humilis, also known as the Chinese wild pear or wild pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used as a powder or capsule, to harness its medicinal properties.
